mapper.insert:
/* ESS사용량 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_ess_usage ( site_id, device_id, std_date, usg_val, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.usgVal}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* ESS사용량 수정 */ UPDATE tb_ess_usage
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
device_id = #{entity.deviceId},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
usg_val = #{entity.usgVal},
mod_date = NOW(),
WHERE ess_usg_idx = #{entity.essUsgIdx}
mapper.select: /* ESS사용량 상세조회 */ SELECT ess_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_date, usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_usage WHERE ess_usg_idx = #{essUsgIdx}

/* ESS사용량 목록조회 */ SELECT ess_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_date, usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_usage
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}

/* 마지막 ESS사용량 상세조회 */ SELECT ess_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_date, usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_usage WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 1
